toast.no_delete_permission: You don't have permission to delete (creator or project owner only)

subtitle_fallback: Start a session to chat with the agent.

info.files_body: Project Files can be selected, pinned, and cited in sessions.
info.members_body: Shared sessions show who can talk with Cowork.

empty.title: No sessions yet
empty.body: Start a session to make this project self-serve.

activity.sync_body: Sessions and files sync in real time.

delete_session.title: Delete this session?
delete_session.body: All messages and sandbox resources in "{{title}}" will be cleaned up. This cannot be undone.

list_page.title: Your projects
list_page.description: Each project is a workspace. Sessions, files, members, automation — all live inside.

skills_page.subtitle: Manage reusable prompt templates and tool bindings in one place.
skills_page.empty_body: The Skills feature is on the way.

schedule_page.subtitle: Manage recurring runs and notification delivery in one place.
schedule_page.empty_body: The schedule feature is on the way.

home.preview_pill_aria: Preview — not yet sent to the server
home.send_blocked_hint: No available model. Set a provider API key or pick another model.

settings_page.delete_project_help: Sessions, messages, uploaded files, and sandbox resources will all be removed. This cannot be undone.
settings_page.delete_dialog_body: All sessions, messages, and uploads in "{{name}}" will be cleaned up. This cannot be undone.

errors.login_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.name_conflict: A project with the same name already exists.

pdf_engine.heading: PDF parsing
pdf_engine.help: How text is parsed from PDFs in the knowledge folder. Kreuzberg is fast; Docling parses tables and layout more accurately but takes longer.

agent_ceiling.help: The maximum actions any member's agent may take in this project. Each member's own grant is intersected with this ceiling. "No limit" allows every capability.
agent_ceiling.no_limit_hint: Members' agents may use any capability, capped only by each member's own grant.
agent_ceiling.save_failed: Failed to save the agent capability ceiling

agent_grant.help: Actions your agent may take in this project. Your grant is intersected with the project ceiling — picks outside the ceiling are kept but stay inactive until an owner adds them to the ceiling.
agent_grant.inherit_hint: Your agent uses exactly what the project ceiling allows. Turn off to pick your own subset.
agent_grant.out_of_ceiling_hint: Outside the project ceiling. It's saved, but your agent can't use it until an owner adds it to the ceiling.

chains_editor.save_failed: Failed to save the recommended model chains
